text: These are the words<S>1697</S> which Moses<S>4872</S> spake<S>1696</S> unto all Israel<S>3478</S> beyond<S>5676</S> the Jordan<S>3383</S> in the wilderness<S>4057</S>, in the Arabah<S>6160</S> over against<S>4136</S> Suph<S>5489</S>, between Paran<S>6290</S>, and Tophel<S>8603</S>, and Laban<S>3837</S>, and Hazeroth<S>2698</S>, and Di-zahab<S>1774</S>.

Yet ye would<S>14</S> not go up<S>5927</S>, but rebelled<S>4784</S> against the commandment<S>6310</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> your God<S>430</S>:

Whither are we going up<S>5927</S>? our brethren<S>251</S> have made our heart<S>3824</S> to melt<S>4549</S>, saying<S>559</S>, The people<S>5971</S> are greater<S>1419</S> and taller<S>7311</S> than we<S>5892</S>; the cities are great<S>1419</S> and fortified up<S>1219</S> to heaven<S>8064</S>; and moreover we have seen<S>7200</S> the sons<S>1121</S> of the Anakim there<S>6062</S>.

Surely there shall not one<S>376</S> of these men<S>582</S> of this evil<S>7451</S> generation<S>1755</S> see<S>7200</S> the good<S>2896</S> land<S>776</S>, which I sware<S>7650</S> to give<S>5414</S> unto your fathers<S>1</S>,

as he did<S>6213</S> for the children<S>1121</S> of Esau<S>6215</S>, that dwell<S>3427</S> in Seir<S>8165</S>, when he destroyed<S>8045</S> the Horites<S>2752</S> from before<S>6440</S> them<S>3423</S>; and they succeeded them<S>3427</S>, and dwelt in their stead even unto this day<S>3117</S>:
